'''bavusu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:practicalist|practicalist]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-v-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:practicalist|practicalist]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| bavusu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bævisith|bævisith]] || [[word:bævisij|bævisij]] || [[word:bævisish|bævisish]] || [[word:bævisi|bævisi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:bavuvusuth|bavuvusuth]] || [[word:bavuvusuj|bavuvusuj]] || [[word:bavuvusush|bavuvusush]] || [[word:bavuvusu|bavuvusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:bavusuth|bavusuth]] || [[word:bavusuj|bavusuj]] || [[word:bavusush|bavusush]] || [[word:bavusu|bavusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:bavufsuth|bavufsuth]] || [[word:bavufsuj|bavufsuj]] || [[word:bavufsush|bavufsush]] || [[word:bavufsuf|bavufsuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:bavusuthu|bavusuthu]] || [[word:bavusuju|bavusuju]] || [[word:bavusushu|bavusushu]] || [[word:bavusuku|bavusuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:bavusuth|bavusuth]] || [[word:bavusuj|bavusuj]] || [[word:bavusush|bavusush]] || [[word:bavusu|bavusu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:bavusuthul|bavusuthul]] || [[word:bavusujul|bavusujul]] || [[word:bavusushul|bavusushul]] || [[word:bavusukul|bavusukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:bavusuthuthu|bavusuthuthu]] || [[word:bavusujuju|bavusujuju]] || [[word:bavusushushu|bavusushushu]] || [[word:bavusuku|bavusuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:bavusuthun|bavusuthun]] || [[word:bavusujun|bavusujun]] || [[word:bavusushun|bavusushun]] || [[word:bavusukun|bavusukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:bavusuthuoro|bavusuthuoro]] || [[word:bavusujuoro|bavusujuoro]] || [[word:bavusushuoro|bavusushuoro]] || [[word:bavusukuoro|bavusukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|91d6f4e}}
